import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx");import __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react_jsx-dev-runtime.js?v=4ec4afff"; const jsxDEV = __vite__cjsImport0_react_jsxDevRuntime["jsxDEV"];
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import __vite__cjsImport3_react from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/react.js?v=4ec4afff"; const useRef = __vite__cjsImport3_react["useRef"]; const useState = __vite__cjsImport3_react["useState"];
import { Upload } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=4ec4afff";
import Modal from "/src/components/ui/Modal.tsx";
import Button from "/src/components/ui/Button.tsx";
import { PLANNER_MUTED, TEXT_BODY } from "/src/features/estimating/ui/estimateWorkspaceTheme.ts";
import ActivityExcelImportPreview, {
  hasActivityExcelPreviewErrors
} from "/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportPreview.tsx";
import {
  parseActivityExcelFile,
  previewImportableRowCount
} from "/src/features/estimating/excel/estimateExcelImportParser.ts";
import { loadProjectActivitiesWithLineItems } from "/src/features/estimating/application/constructionActivityService.ts";
export default function ActivityExcelImportModal({
  isOpen,
  saving,
  projectId,
  estimateId,
  estimateType,
  onClose,
  onApply
}) {
  _s();
  const fileInputRef = useRef(null);
  const [selectedFileName, setSelectedFileName] = useState(null);
  const [parsing, setParsing] = useState(false);
  const [parseError, setParseError] = useState(null);
  const [preview, setPreview] = useState(null);
  const [importableGroups, setImportableGroups] = useState([]);
  const [replaceConfirmed, setReplaceConfirmed] = useState(false);
  const resetState = () => {
    setSelectedFileName(null);
    setParsing(false);
    setParseError(null);
    setPreview(null);
    setImportableGroups([]);
    setReplaceConfirmed(false);
    if (fileInputRef.current) fileInputRef.current.value = "";
  };
  const handleClose = () => {
    if (saving) return;
    resetState();
    onClose();
  };
  const handleFileChange = async (event) => {
    const file = event.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    setSelectedFileName(file.name);
    setParsing(true);
    setParseError(null);
    setPreview(null);
    setImportableGroups([]);
    setReplaceConfirmed(false);
    const existingResult = await loadProjectActivitiesWithLineItems(projectId, estimateId);
    const existingLoaded = existingResult.data ?? [];
    const existingActivities = existingLoaded.map((entry) => entry.activity);
    const existingLineItemsByActivityId = new Map(
      existingLoaded.map((entry) => [entry.activity.id, entry.lineItems])
    );
    const result = await parseActivityExcelFile({
      file,
      expectedEstimateType: estimateType,
      existingActivities,
      existingLineItemsByActivityId
    });
    setParsing(false);
    if (result.errors.length > 0 && !result.preview) {
      setParseError(result.errors[0] ?? "Could not import the selected file.");
      return;
    }
    if (!result.preview) {
      setParseError("Could not import the selected file.");
      return;
    }
    setPreview(result.preview);
    setImportableGroups(result.importableGroups);
    if (result.errors.length > 0) {
      setParseError(result.errors[0] ?? null);
    }
  };
  const importableCount = preview ? previewImportableRowCount(preview) : 0;
  const canApply = Boolean(
    preview && importableGroups.length > 0 && !hasActivityExcelPreviewErrors(preview) && !saving
  );
  const handleApply = async (mode) => {
    if (!canApply) return;
    if (mode === "replace" && !replaceConfirmed) {
      setParseError("Confirm replace mode before replacing all current construction activities.");
      return;
    }
    await onApply({ mode, groups: importableGroups });
    resetState();
  };
  return /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Modal, { isOpen, onClose: handleClose, title: "Import construction activities", size: "lg", children: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "space-y-4", children: [
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("p", { className: `text-sm ${TEXT_BODY}`, children: [
      "Upload an Arden ",
      estimateType === "bid" ? "Bid" : "Detailed",
      " Estimate Template file (.xlsx). Rows are grouped into construction activities and line items. Totals are recalculated in Arden."
    ] }, void 0, true, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
      lineNumber: 151,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex flex-col gap-3 sm:flex-row sm:items-center", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
        "input",
        {
          ref: fileInputRef,
          type: "file",
          accept: ".xlsx,application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
          className: "hidden",
          onChange: handleFileChange
        },
        void 0,
        false,
        {
          fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
          lineNumber: 157,
          columnNumber: 11
        },
        this
      ),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
        Button,
        {
          type: "button",
          variant: "outline",
          size: "sm",
          icon: /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Upload, { className: "h-4 w-4" }, void 0, false, {
            fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
            lineNumber: 168,
            columnNumber: 19
          }, this),
          disabled: saving || parsing,
          onClick: () => fileInputRef.current?.click(),
          children: parsing ? "Reading file..." : "Choose file"
        },
        void 0,
        false,
        {
          fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
          lineNumber: 164,
          columnNumber: 11
        },
        this
      ),
      selectedFileName ? /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { className: `text-sm ${PLANNER_MUTED}`, children: selectedFileName }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
        lineNumber: 175,
        columnNumber: 11
      }, this) : null
    ] }, void 0, true, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
      lineNumber: 156,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this),
    parseError ? /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("p", { className: "text-sm text-red-700 dark:text-red-300", children: parseError }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
      lineNumber: 180,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this) : null,
    preview ? /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(ActivityExcelImportPreview, { preview }, void 0, false, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
      lineNumber: 183,
      columnNumber: 20
    }, this) : null,
    preview && !hasActivityExcelPreviewErrors(preview) ? /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("label", { className: `flex items-start gap-2 text-sm ${TEXT_BODY}`, children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
        "input",
        {
          type: "checkbox",
          className: "mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-cyan-600 focus:ring-cyan-500 dark:border-slate-600",
          checked: replaceConfirmed,
          onChange: (event) => setReplaceConfirmed(event.target.checked)
        },
        void 0,
        false,
        {
          fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
          lineNumber: 187,
          columnNumber: 13
        },
        this
      ),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("span", { children: "I understand replace mode removes all current construction activities before importing." }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
        lineNumber: 193,
        columnNumber: 13
      }, this)
    ] }, void 0, true, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
      lineNumber: 186,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this) : null,
    /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV("div", { className: "flex flex-col-reverse gap-2 sm:flex-row sm:justify-end", children: [
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(Button, { type: "button", variant: "outline", disabled: saving, onClick: handleClose, children: "Cancel" }, void 0, false, {
        fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
        lineNumber: 200,
        columnNumber: 11
      }, this),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
        Button,
        {
          type: "button",
          variant: "outline",
          disabled: !canApply,
          isLoading: saving,
          onClick: () => handleApply("add"),
          children: [
            "Import ",
            importableCount,
            " valid row",
            importableCount === 1 ? "" : "s"
          ]
        },
        void 0,
        true,
        {
          fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
          lineNumber: 203,
          columnNumber: 11
        },
        this
      ),
      /* @__PURE__ */ jsxDEV(
        Button,
        {
          type: "button",
          variant: "accent",
          disabled: !canApply || !replaceConfirmed,
          isLoading: saving,
          onClick: () => handleApply("replace"),
          children: "Replace current estimate"
        },
        void 0,
        false,
        {
          fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
          lineNumber: 212,
          columnNumber: 11
        },
        this
      )
    ] }, void 0, true, {
      fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
      lineNumber: 199,
      columnNumber: 9
    }, this)
  ] }, void 0, true, {
    fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
    lineNumber: 150,
    columnNumber: 7
  }, this) }, void 0, false, {
    fileName: "C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx",
    lineNumber: 149,
    columnNumber: 5
  }, this);
}
_s(ActivityExcelImportModal, "J2DPwsp47LXvPowT+gbI6AtZ+kA=");
_c = ActivityExcelImportModal;
var _c;
$RefreshReg$(_c, "ActivityExcelImportModal");
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  window.$RefreshReg$ = prevRefreshReg;
  window.$RefreshSig$ = prevRefreshSig;
}
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  RefreshRuntime.__hmr_import(import.meta.url).then((currentExports) => {
    RefreshRuntime.registerExportsForReactRefresh("C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx", currentExports);
    import.meta.hot.accept((nextExports) => {
      if (!nextExports) return;
      const invalidateMessage = RefreshRuntime.validateRefreshBoundaryAndEnqueueUpdate("C:/dev/calc/src/features/estimating/ui/components/ActivityExcelImportModal.tsx", currentExports, nextExports);
      if (invalidateMessage) import.meta.hot.invalidate(invalidateMessage);
    });
  });
}
